mapper.select:
SELECT i.inbound_id AS inboundId, i.order_id AS orderId, o.expected_arrived_date AS expectedArrivedDate,
CASE WHEN COUNT(ii.material_id) = 1 THEN MAX(m.material_name) ELSE CONCAT(MAX(m.material_name), ' 외 ', COUNT(ii.material_id) - 1, '건') END AS representativeName,
SUM(moi.order_quantity) AS totalOrderQty,
SUM(ii.quantity) AS totalInboundQty,
CASE WHEN SUM(ii.quantity) = 0 THEN '미입고' WHEN SUM(ii.quantity) >= SUM(moi.order_quantity) THEN '입고완료' ELSE '부분입고' END AS status,
i.handled_by AS handledBy, i.inbound_date AS inboundDate
FROM material_inbound i LEFT JOIN material_inbound_item ii ON i.inbound_id = ii.inbound_id LEFT JOIN material m ON ii.material_id = m.material_id LEFT JOIN material_order_item moi ON i.order_id = moi.order_id AND moi.material_id = ii.material_id LEFT JOIN material_order o ON i.order_id = o.order_id
( i.inbound_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR i.order_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR m.material_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR i.handled_by LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
AND DATE(i.inbound_date) >= #{startDate}
AND DATE(i.inbound_date) <= #{endDate}
GROUP BY i.inbound_id
ORDER BY
i.inbound_id i.inbound_date o.expected_arrived_date i.inbound_id
${sortOrder}
LIMIT #{pageStart}, #{perPageNum}

SELECT mo.order_id AS orderId, mo.created_by AS createdBy, mo.expected_arrived_date AS expectedArrivedDate,
CASE WHEN COUNT(*) = 1 THEN MAX(m.material_name) ELSE CONCAT(MAX(m.material_name), ' 외 ', COUNT(*) - 1, '건') END AS materialName,
SUM(moi.order_quantity) AS totalQuantity, 0 AS inboundQuantity
FROM material_order mo JOIN material_order_item moi ON mo.order_id = moi.order_id JOIN material m ON moi.material_id = m.material_id
WHERE mo.order_status = '승인' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM material_inbound_item mii WHERE mii.order_item_id = moi.order_item_id )
GROUP BY mo.order_id ORDER BY mo.order_date DESC
LIMIT #{pageStart}, #{perPageNum}

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT mo.order_id) FROM material_order mo JOIN material_order_item moi ON mo.order_id = moi.order_id WHERE mo.order_status = '승인' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM material_inbound_item mii WHERE mii.order_item_id = moi.order_item_id )

SELECT oi.order_item_id, oi.order_id, oi.material_id, oi.order_quantity FROM material_order_item oi JOIN material_order mo ON oi.order_id = mo.order_id LEFT JOIN material_inbound_item mii ON oi.order_item_id = mii.order_item_id WHERE mo.order_status = '승인' AND mii.order_item_id IS NULL

SELECT CONCAT('IN-RM-', DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d'), '-', LPAD(IFNULL(MAX(CAST(SUBSTRING_INDEX(inbound_id, '-', -1) AS UNSIGNED)), 0) + 1, 3, '0')) FROM material_inbound WHERE inbound_id LIKE CONCAT('IN-RM-', DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d'), '%');
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO material_inbound (inbound_id, order_id, inbound_status) VALUES (#{inboundId}, #{orderId}, #{inboundStatus})
INSERT INTO material_inbound_item (inbound_id, order_item_id, material_id, quantity) VALUES (#{inboundId}, #{orderItemId}, #{materialId}, 0)
mapper.select: SELECT oi.order_item_id, oi.order_id, oi.material_id, oi.order_quantity FROM material_order_item oi JOIN material_order mo ON oi.order_id = mo.order_id LEFT JOIN material_inbound_item mii ON oi.order_item_id = mii.order_item_id WHERE mo.order_status = '승인' AND mii.order_item_id IS NULL AND oi.order_id = #{orderId}
